JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2003 AT 9:10 AM IN DEPT. 611, DIANE ELAN WICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2003 9:10 AM FOR DEPT 611

COURT TRIAL-DEFAULT PROVE-UP HELD ON OCT-14-2003 IN DEPT. 611 - WITNESSES SWORN/EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IDENTIFIED/ADMITTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION AND DAMAGES. JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK CLERK MARILYN FLORES COURT REPORTER CANDACE YOUNT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARVIND, MIKE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILKINS, BARNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 910 GEARY STREET #15 SAN FRANCISCO $1,120.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,120.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
